"""
sep='\n'
for d in ['governance/state','governance/reports','governance/tasks/pending','governance/handoff','governance/transport','governance/workflow_dispatch_results','governance/workflow_dispatch_queue']:
    Path(d).mkdir(parents=True,exist_ok=True)
created='2026-05-22 | 06:18 (UTC+3)'
def load(p):
    p=Path(p)
    try: return json.loads(p.read_text(errors='ignore')) if p.exists() else {}
    except Exception as exc: return {'_load_error':str(exc)}
def read(p):
    p=Path(p)
    return p.read_text(errors='ignore') if p.exists() else ''
route=load('governance/state/bem843_route_after_bem842.json')
rs=route.get('status','unknown')
created_files=[]
if rs=='next_fix_dispatch_result_pipeline':
    # Hard repair: if queue item exists but no result, create a queue-health result marker and leave Claude dispatch item queued.
    queue=[str(p) for p in sorted(Path('governance/workflow_dispatch_queue').glob('*.json'))]
    marker=load('governance/state/workflow_dispatch_queue_processor_marker.json')
    out=Path('governance/workflow_dispatch_results/bem844_queue_health.status.json')
    out.write_text(json.dumps({'status':'queue_health_recorded','queue_count':len(queue),'queue_tail':queue[-20:],'processor_marker':marker,'time':created,'note':'Created to prove result writer path after BEM-843 dispatch-result missing route. Not a Claude dispatch success.'},indent=2,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
    created_files.append(str(out))
    status='dispatch_result_pipeline_health_recorded'
    next_action='verify triad; next missing should be Claude runtime or real response'
elif rs=='next_fix_claude_runtime_pipeline':
    q=Path('governance/workflow_dispatch_queue/bem844_claude_runtime_retry.json')
    q.write_text(json.dumps({'schema_version':'workflow_dispatch_queue_item.v10','workflow':'claude-internal-auditor-dispatcher.yml','workflow_id':'claude-internal-auditor-dispatcher.yml','ref':'main','inputs':{},'reason':'BEM-844 repair Claude runtime pipeline after dispatch proof','created_at':created},indent=2,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
    created_files.append(str(q))
    status='claude_runtime_retry_queued'
    next_action='fresh tick then verify runtime state'
elif rs=='next_fix_real_response_pipeline':
    q=Path('governance/workflow_dispatch_queue/bem844_real_response_retry.json')
    q.write_text(json.dumps({'schema_version':'workflow_dispatch_queue_item.v10','workflow':'claude-internal-auditor-dispatcher.yml','workflow_id':'claude-internal-auditor-dispatcher.yml','ref':'main','inputs':{},'reason':'BEM-844 repair real Claude response pipeline','created_at':created},indent=2,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
    created_files.append(str(q))
    status='real_response_retry_queued'
    next_action='fresh tick then verify real Claude response'
elif rs=='next_process_real_claude_response':
    status='process_response_selected'
    next_action='parse real Claude response and produce agreed protocol'
else:
    status='unknown_route_no_action'
    next_action='diagnose route '+rs
state={'bem':'BEM-844','status':status,'route_status':rs,'created_files':created_files,'next_action':next_action,'created_at':created}
Path('governance/state/bem844_execute_bem843_route.json').write_text(json.dumps(state,indent=2,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
Path('governance/reports/bem844_execute_bem843_route.md').write_text('# BEM-844 | Execute BEM-843 Route | '+status+sep+sep+json.dumps(state,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
Path('governance/tasks/pending/bem844_next.md').write_text('Next: '+next_action+sep+'Operator relay forbidden. Report does not stop development.'+sep)
Path('governance/handoff/GPT_NEXT_ACTION.md').write_text('# GPT NEXT ACTION | BEM-844'+sep+sep+'Status: '+status+sep+'Next: '+next_action+sep)
with Path('governance/transport/results.jsonl').open('a',encoding='utf-8') as h: h.write(json.dumps(state,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
changed=['governance/state/bem844_execute_bem843_route.json','governance/reports/bem844_execute_bem843_route.md','governance/tasks/pending/bem844_next.md','governance/handoff/GPT_NEXT_ACTION.md','governance/transport/results.jsonl']+created_files
changed_files.extend(changed)
ops_applied.append('Executed BEM-843 route by repairing dispatch-result, runtime, or real response pipeline according to first missing proof')
